purpose: Default routing policy for interpreting generated model buckets before Workframe/autocorp consumes them.
routing_rules: Use free models as local-dev/opportunistic workers only unless a human explicitly promotes them.
Use paid primary models for normal coding and documentation after matrix validation.
Use premium/high_reasoning models for architecture, security, final review, and ambiguous failures.
Never treat OpenRouter popularity as quality proof.
Do not promote metadata-backed roles to eval-backed roles until eval results exist.
